❝Quit being such a fuckin’ brat already.. drives me nuts enough that I have to sit here while you get drunk off your ass. Do y’know how hard it is to not grab a drink right now? Very fucking hard. Cmon. We’re leaving.❞

Brought to you by LCX.Co and in your nearest theater near you, I present a knock off version of To All The Boys I’ve Loved.

At least that’s how all of Luí’s friends that have girlfriends would describe what was going on in his already shitty life. He’s a knock off of that one rugby player fucker or whatever he played, doing it to make a girl jealous just to end up tripping over his own two feet himself.

Pathetic. It’s all pathetic. How did a guy like him, a fucking cholo who has a history of always having a strap on him yet manages to lose his phone at the randomest times, ever turn into.. a god damn pussy.

Evan’s the root of this problem, so is his own sick need to get back at his ex, but now? Now it’s spiraled into something far, far worse. A fucking crush.
